title: Fine Elements 0.5L Plastic Travel Kettle with Auto Cut Off, Boil Dry Protection, Two White Cups Included, Lightweight and Portable with Concealed Heating Element
features: LIGHTWEIGHT AND PORTABLE - This kettle is ideal for trips away - Keep your case lightly packed with this plastic 0.5L travel kettle
TWO CUPS INCLUDED - The kettle comes included with two white plastic cups - Make a cup of tea or coffee wherever your travels may take you
EXTERNAL WATER GAUGE - Use the water gauge to see how much water you are putting in the kettle - Boil up to 500ml at a time with this handy travel kettle
AUTO & MANUAL SWITCH OFF - Save energy and stay safe with our automatic switch off feature - This kettle shows when in use with an LED indicator
CONCEALED HEATING ELEMENT - Prevent limescale build-up with the concealed heating element to protect & preserve the interior of the kettle
description: From the manufacturer AUTO & MANUAL SWITCH OFF Save energy and stay safe with our automatic switch off feature - This kettle shows when in use with an LED indicator. HANDY CORD STORAGE With a safe-saving cord storage feature, this kettle is ideal to be taken on trips, in mobile homes and caravans. EXTERNAL WATER GAUGE Use the water gauge to see how much water you are putting in the kettle - Boil up to 500ml at a time with this handy travel kettle.
